title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: AWS Developers presents five production deployment patterns for TypeScript AI agents: streaming for responsiveness, layered authentication, type-safe database access with tenant isolation, guardrails with cost budgets, and observability through metrics and distributed tracing. The patterns are technology-agnostic but demonstrated on AWS infrastructure and the Strands Agents SDK.
